scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:api: gcloud run deploy madden-roster-editor-api --source backend --region us-central1 --allow-unauthenticated --memory 2Gi --cpu 2 --min-instances 1 --max-instances 1
scripts.serve:hosting: npm run build && npx firebase-tools emulators:start --only hosting --project demo-madden-roster-editor
scripts.serve:hosting:ci: npm run build && npx firebase-tools hosting:channel:deploy local-preview
